modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to open PDF files on MacBook Pro

full_description_text: 
User is trying to open a PDF file they received via email but keeps getting an error. The error states that the document is damaged and cannot be repaired. This issue is happening on their MacBook Pro, and they are unable to access the PDF at all. They mentioned that Adobe PDF documents will not open, which is causing frustration.
short_description: Unable to open PDF files on MacBook Pro
